speaker: speaker1
text: I'm too tired now . I've already worked for 12 hours overtime !

speaker: speaker2
text: God ! Don't you think they should get you an assistant ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes , they were supposed to , but so far nobody's turned up , and I have to do the work alone . This is the first break I've had all day .

speaker: speaker2
text: They're really running you into the ground . Why don't you ask for some time off ? You could take a long weekend and have a good rest .

speaker: speaker1
text: I'm afraid I can't before I finish this project .

speaker: speaker2
text: You'd better pay more attention to your health .

speaker: speaker1
text: I will , thanks for your concern .
